title: Blim
description: Adds a new dimension tons of new blocks, items, and tools, but you never know what lurks in the shadows..
body:
Feel free to use this mod in your modpack!

![A minecraft screenshot of planet green with a new mob in the center](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c5721e72de824edde9fe120f63c8ca22bba39ef.png)

# The Blim Mod
This mod adds a new dimension called planet green. It can be accesed by collecting portal shards from portal vines, allowing you to craft a dimensional magnet from nine of them. Now you can fight portal pig. Once you beat him you can acces planet green by igniting a portal made out of GreenBits. These can be found commonly underground. Once you enter the portal you can find blimitite underground to make gear, containers, and more.

Besides blimitite, there is much to explore, including 5 new biomes. Some of them have bosses to fight, and some of them.. well, **you never know..**
